parameters.query: SELECT id, data_hash, sync_version, last_updated, source_of_truth FROM central_patients WHERE id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';

UPDATE central_patients SET payload_data = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.payload_data) }}', data_hash = '{{ $json.data_hash }}', sync_version = {{ $json.sync_version }}, last_updated = NOW(), source_of_truth = '{{ $json.source_system }}' WHERE id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';
UPDATE legacy_patients SET name = '{{ $json.payload_data.name }}', phone = '{{ $json.payload_data.phone }}', last_sync = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';

INSERT INTO sync_audit_log (record_id, source_system, action_taken, reason, timestamp) VALUES ('{{ $json.record_id }}', '{{ $json.source_system }}', '{{ $json.action }}', '{{ $json.reason }}', NOW());
